diagrams.title: Risk Priority Matrix
diagrams.description: 3×3 matrix showing risk categorization based on probability and impact
diagrams.purpose: Visualize and prioritize identified risks for mitigation planning

diagrams.title: Risk Management Process Flow
diagrams.description: Cyclical diagram showing phases of risk management
diagrams.purpose: Understand the continuous nature of risk management throughout project lifecycle

diagrams.title: Risk Response Strategies Overview
diagrams.description: Four-quadrant diagram showing risk response strategies
diagrams.purpose: Learn different strategies for handling identified risks based on their characteristics

diagrams.title: RPN Calculation Formula
diagrams.description: Formula diagram showing Risk Priority Number computation
diagrams.purpose: Learn how to calculate and interpret Risk Priority Numbers for prioritization
